label: Site Name
description: Name of the web site: i.e. Example.com

label: Site Tagline
description: Tagline of the website

label: Site Logo
description: Path for the logo to be display in email (recommended): i.e. images/logo.png (Default: null)

label: Site Favicon
description: Path for the favicon to be display: i.e. favicon.ico (Default: null)

label: Site Apple Touch Icon
description: Path for the appleTouchIcon to be display: i.e. apple-touch-icon.png (Default: null)

label: Site Author
description: The author that will be set in the meta data

label: Site first online date
description: Date when the site went online

label: Site URL
description: URL of the website i.e. https://example.com

label: URL Terms of use
description: URL of the terms of use page i.e. https://example.com/terms-of-use

label: Hosted By URL
description: URL of the hosting company i.e. https://example.com

label: Hosted By Logo
description: Path or URL of the hosting company logo

label: Made By URL
description: URL of the developer/agency i.e. https://example.com

label: Made By Logo
description: Path or URL of the developer/agency logo

label: URL Cookies Policy
description: URL of the cookies policy page i.e. https://example.com/cookies

label: Matomo URL
description: URL of the Matomo instance i.e. https://matomo.example.com

label: Matomo Site ID
description: Matomo site ID (integer)

label: Backup DB Host
description: MySQL host for backups

label: Backup DB User
description: MySQL user for backups

label: Backup DB Password
description: MySQL password for backups

label: Backup Database
description: Name of the MySQL database to back up

label: Backup Mailto
description: Email address for backup reports and error notifications
